SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BICHSEL AMALGAMATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RITUAL COFFEE ROASTERS $1,530.00 PRINCIPAL, $84.40 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,664.40 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
